title: Skipper's Venture
description: A modpack for the SkippyZii SMP Season 2! Content-ful but runs well!
body:
**_"The old has gone, and the new has come!"_**

# ~ Welcome to Skipper's Venture ~ ##
This is the modpack for the SkippyZii SMP Season 2, a mid-weight pack that's full of content and potential while running well on most systems! 

This isn't the next big thing, sure, but we will still guarantee an experience that you will enjoy, whether it's the exploration, combat, building, or even technology (optional to progression but worth playing around with :>).

### Some notable mods included in this pack:
- Ice and Fire
- Iron's Spells and Spellbooks
- Marium's Soulslike Weaponry
- Apotheosis
- FTB Quests
- Explorify
- Farmer's Delight
- Supplimentaries
- Create
- Applied Energistics 2 
- Deeper Darker

This modpack also includes Vanilla Tweaks with tweaks curated for various quality of life changes and cosmetic changes for funsies:
https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/

Note: There will be a disclaimer that FancyMenu System Interactions Addon is installed on your first open most likely. It's only there to suppliment the extra installation process of the missing mods not in modrinth (where it'll just open the mods folder of the pack, that is all).

**This modpack requires some mods that are exclusively on CurseForge, if you open the game without them, there will be a menu that will assist in installing them, otherwise here are the links for download:**
[FTB Filter System](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-filter-system/download/6466153),
[FTB Xmod Compat](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-xmod-compat/download/6402486),
[FTB Library](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-library-forge/download/6807424),
[FTB Teams](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-teams-forge/download/6130786),
[FTB Quests](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-quests-forge/download/6829212),
[Apotheosis](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/apotheosis/download/6461960),
[Apothic Attributes](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/apothic-attributes/download/5634071),
[Placebo](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/placebo/download/6274231),
[Integrated Simply Swords](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/integrated-simply-swords/download/6772660),
[RangedJS](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/rangedjs-kubejs-addon/download/6910795)
